extortion.description: [AI generated] Moore & Giles is a Virginia-based company specializing in the design and distribution of high-quality leather and luxury home furnishings. Founded in 1933, they collaborate with tanneries worldwide. The company not only serves the high-end residential, hospitality and aviation markets, but also offers handbags, luggage and accessories in its product line. They are known for innovative designs and commitment to environmental accountability.
